---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / Motivation

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the use case it enables.

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered and why you prefer this one.

## Additional Context

Links, references, or examples from other libraries are welcome.
